title: The Girl in the Taxi
writer: Robert A. McGowan, Hugh Stanislaus Stange
actors: Flora Parker DeHaven, Carter DeHaven, King Baggot
plot: John Stewart considers his son Bertie a mollycoddle. Refused an increased allowance, Bertie pawns his father's best clothes and while hiding in a waiting taxi is suddenly whirled away with a strange, beautiful young lady. Later, B...
